# Welcome to the Mintax community

**Powered by Mindtris (Mintax)**

Mintax is an open source business operating system built by [Mindtris](https://www.mindtris.com). We believe the tools that run modern businesses should be transparent, modifiable, and owned by the people using them.

## Start here

- [README](https://github.com/mindtris/mintax#readme) — overview and quick start
- [Roadmap](https://github.com/mindtris/mintax/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md) — what we're building
- [Contributing guide](https://github.com/mindtris/mintax/blob/main/docs/CONTRIBUTING.md) — how to get involved
- [Open source manifesto](https://github.com/mindtris/mintax/blob/main/docs/OPENSOURCE.md) — why we build in the open

## Ways to participate

- **Ask questions** — Use the Q&A category
- **Share ideas** — Use the Ideas category (we review weekly)
- **Show and tell** — Built something with Mintax? Share it
- **Report bugs** — Open an [issue](https://github.com/mindtris/mintax/issues/new/choose)
- **Contribute code** — Pick a [good first issue](https://github.com/mindtris/mintax/labels/good%20first%20issue) and go

## Community standards

Please read and follow our [Code of Conduct](https://github.com/mindtris/mintax/blob/main/docs/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md). We aim to keep this a welcoming space for everyone.

## Get in touch

- **General questions** — this Discussions board
- **Bugs / feature requests** — [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/mindtris/mintax/issues)
- **Commercial / enterprise** — support@mindtris.com

---

Thanks for being here. Let's build Mintax together.
